creator: foxfair@mail.progolf2.com.tw
text:
Installing procedure of prts/mail/majordomo will be lag at createuser script
file. see following :
freebsd[root]:/usr/ports/mail/majordomo# make install
===>  Configuring for majordomo-1.94.4
majordom user using uid 54
majordom user using gid 54 <-- Stop here. zzzZZZZ....

How-To-Repeat: try to install majordomo, you will see that.
